query:
SELECT BINARY nombre as nombre_bin, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM clientes
GROUP BY BINARY nombre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 344B2FJrSHdkSxo.0ab51ce41b50 --database bUSGvjzrZfvVXNhQ347wq4 --execute SELECT BINARY nombre as nombre_bin, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids
FROM clientes
GROUP BY BINARY nombre
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;
